stimulus: In order to make practical use of the polio vaccine in the 1950s, researchers had to develop a method for growing large quantities of the polio virus safely in a laboratory setting. ______blank it was virologist Isabel Morgan who pioneered the techniques that allowed the necessary virus cultures to be produced.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. "Ultimately" logically signals that Morgan's pioneering of the techniques was the conclusion of the process described in the previous sentence, in which researchers sought to develop a method for growing the polio virus.

Choice A is incorrect because "in other words" illogically signals a restatement. Instead, Morgan's work was the conclusion of those efforts. Choice B is incorrect because "secondly" illogically signals merely the next step. Instead, her techniques were the culmination of the effort. Choice D is incorrect because "in addition" illogically signals additional information. Instead, Morgan's work was the conclusion of the researchers' efforts.
